1.description: get Narvik municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get snow-avalanche hazard polygons intersecting Narvik extent (prefilter by municipality bbox)

3.description: get buildings in Narvik with their geometry

4.description: find buildings that intersect hazard polygons

5.description: count distinct buildings intersecting hazard polygons

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%narvik%'
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%narvik%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [snoskredaktsomhetskart]
SELECT objid, skredtype, sikkerhetsklasse, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1806')) ;

1.description: find Narvik municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in the Narvik municipality by kommunenummer (filter to municipality)

3.description: get avalanche hazard polygons that intersect Narvik extent (will be reduced by municipality bbox)

4.description: find buildings that intersect hazard polygons

5.description: count distinct buildings intersecting hazard polygons
